name: Hope Education Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hope Education Group Co., Ltd. provides higher education services in China. The company provides technician education and training, self-study examination, adult education, technical management and consultancy, and other training services, as well as sells textbooks and dormitory beddings. As of August 31, 2020, it owned and operated 16 schools in 6 provinces, including 6 colleges and universities, 8 junior colleges, and 2 technician colleges. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China. Hope Education Group Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Hope Education Investment Limited.
